title: Vanilla Expanded+
description: Vanilla gets boring, this modpack expands what vanilla already has, but also adds some new things. Have fun!
body:
Vanilla Expanded+ aims to enhance the vanilla experience by adding new terrain and structures to explore while also adding better visuals and audio.

Adventure: Adds new structures that fit the vanilla style, while also upgrading vanilla structures and terrain.

Combat: Adds a couple new mobs to battle such as the illusioner and more with the help of  Friends and Foes, and AdventureZ.

World generation: Uses the mods Terra and William Wyther's Expanded Ecosphere to give a better exploration experience.

Blocks: Adds many new blocks, such as marble, bluestone, limestone, and viridite.

Multiplayer: Uses the mod essential so that you can invite your friends to join you directly into a singleplayer world.

Video: Uses mods like Visuality and the Vanilla Evolved resource pack and others to help make the game look even better. There are also shaders but not everyone's pc can run shaders.

Audio: Includes the Presence Footsteps mod and the Ambient sounds mod to make exploration even better. 

Some things: You may want to change the WTHIT settings in the mod menu to turn the scale down, but its just up to preference.
